top_signals.title: Kraken Institutional taps Upshift to build vaults that earn yield on idle bitcoin, ETH and stablecoins
top_signals.summary: Upshift will build dedicated vaults tailored to each client’s specific investment strategy and risk considerations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Todd Blanche says he has 'full faith' in Kash Patel as FBI director
top_signals.summary: Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
